name: ZOTAC GAMING GeForce RTX 4060 Ti 8GB Twin Edge DLSS 3 8GB GDDR6 Graphics Card
description: ZOTAC GAMING GeForce RTX 4060 Ti 8GB Twin Edge DLSS 3 8GB GDDR6 Graphics Card What is ZOTAC GAMING GeForce RTX 4060 Ti 8GB Twin Edge DLSS 3 8GB GDDR6 Graphics Card price in Pakistan? ZOTAC GAMING GeForce RTX 4060 Ti 8GB Twin Edge DLSS 3 8GB GDDR6 Graphics Card price in Pakistan is Rs.134,000. It features 4352 CUDA cores with boost clock up to 2535 MHz and 8 GB GDDR6 memory on a 128-bit bus for strong 1080p/1440p gaming performance. Built on PCIe 4.0 x8 with HDMI 2.1a and DisplayPort 1.4a outputs
